name: Dust Keys
explanation: A lo-fi 8-bit melodic sampler. One original sampled instrument voice (a warm detuned choir/string pad) is baked in as PCM and played back polyphonically, pitch-tracked with a sustain loop. The signature grit comes from a lo-fi stage — bit-depth reduction plus sample-rate decimation (the Bits knob) — feeding a resonant low-pass filter and an ADSR. Controls: Cutoff, Resonance, Bits (lo-fi crush), Attack, Decay, Level. The sampled voice is original, self-authored CC0 content synthesised offline (no third-party samples).
